title: Support - Device - No Devices Connected screen
scenario: Support > Device screen shows incorrect "No Devices Connected" message when no devices have been previously connected
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Ensure no Bluetooth audio devices have been previously paired/connected to the app.
4. Tap on the Support menu option.
5. Tap on the Device screen within Support.
6. Observe the message displayed on the screen.
expected: The screen displays the message: "No previously connected devices were found. Please connect devices using the mobile device's Bluetooth Settings prior to requesting device support." The screen layout matches the Figma design.
